--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -35,6 +35,19 @@
         return pixel_values

 

 

+def run_view(model, head, data_path, processor, device, batch_size, num_workers, hflip=False):

+    ds = TestDataset(data_path, processor, hflip=hflip)

+    loader = DataLoader(ds, batch_size=batch_size, shuffle=False, num_workers=num_workers, pin_memory=True)

+    logits_list = []

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        for x in loader:

+            x = x.to(device, non_blocking=True)

+            feats = model.encode_image(x)

+            logits = head.predict(feats) if hasattr(head, 'predict') else head(feats)

+            logits_list.append(logits.cpu())

+    return torch.cat(logits_list, dim=0)

+

+

+def make_balanced_weights(labels, num_classes, beta=0.9999):

+    counts = torch.bincount(labels, minlength=num_classes).float()

+    effective_num = 1.0 - torch.pow(torch.tensor(beta), counts)

+    weights = (1.0 - beta) / torch.clamp(effective_num, min=1e-8)

+    weights[counts == 0] = 0.0

+    weights = weights / torch.clamp(weights.sum(), min=1e-8) * num_classes

+    return weights
